description_long: This combat tactical vehicle is a heavily armored, tracked military vehicle with a low, angular profile designed for urban combat. Its exterior is covered in dark, matte armor plating with visible modular panels and sloped surfaces for deflection. The vehicle features a prominent main cannon mounted on the left front side and a secondary machine gun mounted on the roof, along with various hatches, periscopes, and equipment storage racks. The sides are equipped with additional armor skirts and storage compartments, while the roof has railings and access points for crew. The vehicle's tracks are robust and partially shielded by side skirts, providing enhanced mobility over rough terrain. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and crew survivability in hostile environments.
description: A heavily armored, tracked combat vehicle with a main cannon, roof-mounted machine gun, and modular sloped armor panels. Its dark, matte finish and robust design emphasize protection and firepower.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main cannon, sloped frontal armor, and the low, wide profile of the vehicle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the main cannon, side armor skirts, and roof-mounted machine gun.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, rear access points, and the continuation of the side skirts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the vehicle's tracks, side armor, and additional roof details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the left front, one machine gun mount on the roof center.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, modular armor panels on all sides, including reinforced side skirts and roof.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green with subtle black and gray paneling; no distinct camouflage pattern.
